SEARCH
Package io.github.kirstenali.deepj.transformer

Class LlamaTransformerBuilder

java.lang.Object
io.github.kirstenali.deepj.transformer.LlamaTransformerBuilder
public final class LlamaTransformerBuilder extends Object
Builder for Llama-style transformer stacks.

Assembles a TransformerStack of LlamaTransformerBlocks (RMSNorm + RoPE attention + SwiGLU).

See Also:

  • DeepSeekTransformerBuilder
